en: I don't think it would have sold a million copies, but it would have made a nice gift for you.
Hey, you guys. Hey. Uh, sweetie, we've got to go.
No, why do we always have to do everything according to your timetable?
Actually, it's the movie theater that has the timetable.
It's so you don't miss the beginning. No, see, this isn't about the movie theater.
This is about you stealing my wind.
I can't pull that off, can I?
ko: 그건 내가 할 수 없어, 켄나. 실례합니다.

en: Yes, my wind. How do you expect me to grow if you won't let me blow?
ko: 내가 성장하기를 기대하나요, 당신이 날 방해하지 않는다면?

en: You know I don't have a...
ko: 나는 문제 없다는 걸 알아요. 그것은요.
